response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 15+ years of senior engineering experience and demonstrated open-source leadership, but critical gaps prevent recommendation for this executive role. German language proficiency is listed as "Basic" when C1 (fluent professional) is required. More importantly, there is no evidence of team leadership at scale or consulting background essential for operational Head of Development responsibilities. Architecture and UML expertise are also not highlighted. While technically capable, the candidate lacks management experience and language fluency required for this position.
strengths: Extensive senior/staff-level engineering background across diverse domains (web, embedded, real-time systems) with 15+ years of proven delivery
Demonstrated open-source leadership through GISCollective founding and multiple published projects with real-world adoption
Strong communication skills evidenced by conference talks (FOSS4G), workshops, and ability to share knowledge across technical domains
concerns: German language proficiency listed as "Basic" but role requires C1 minimum fluency for client-facing advisory work
No explicit evidence of managing teams or people-leadership experience at scale required for Head of Development role
Missing required competencies: IT architecture methodology, UML expertise, IT security/compliance knowledge, and consulting experience

key_factors.factor: German language proficiency gap (Basic vs C1 required)
Limited team management and operational leadership experience
Technical breadth and open-source contribution track record
